result.stdout:
Description:
  $dotnet dacpac migrations

Usage:
  dacmig [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  add <name>   Add a new migration
  check        Checks if the project and migrations are in sync.
  deploy <to>  Deploy migrations to a database
  script <to>  Generate the deployment script

commands.payload:
Description:
  $dotnet dacpac migrations

Usage:
  dacmig [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  add <name>   Add a new migration
  check        Checks if the project and migrations are in sync.
  deploy <to>  Deploy migrations to a database
  script <to>  Generate the deployment script

result.stdout:
Description:
  Add a new migration

Usage:
  dacmig add <name> [options]

Arguments:
  <name>  name of the migration

Options:
  -p, --project-path <project-path>            path to the database project [default: .]
  -c, --connection-string <connection-string>  connection string to a database used internally.
  -?, -h, --help                               Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Checks if the project and migrations are in sync.

Usage:
  dacmig check [options]

Options:
  -p, --project-path <project-path>            path to the database project [default: .]
  -c, --connection-string <connection-string>  connection string to a database used internally.
  -?, -h, --help                               Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Deploy migrations to a database

Usage:
  dacmig deploy [<to>] [options]

Arguments:
  <to>  The target migration. Defaults to the last migration.

Options:
  -d, --db-name <db-name> (REQUIRED)                                    Name of the target database
  -m, --migrations-path <migrations-path>                               path to migration scripts folder [default: ./Migrations]
  -t, --target-connection-string <target-connection-string> (REQUIRED)  connection string to the target database
  -c, --create-database                                                 Create the database. [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help                                                        Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Deploy migrations to a database

Usage:
  dacmig deploy [<to>] [options]

Arguments:
  <to>  The target migration. Defaults to the last migration.

Options:
  -d, --db-name <db-name> (REQUIRED)                                    Name of the target database
  -m, --migrations-path <migrations-path>                               path to migration scripts folder [default: ./Migrations]
  -t, --target-connection-string <target-connection-string> (REQUIRED)  connection string to the target database
  -c, --create-database                                                 Create the database. [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help                                                        Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Generate the deployment script

Usage:
  dacmig script [<to>] [options]

Arguments:
  <to>  The target migration. Defaults to the last migration.

Options:
  -d, --db-name <db-name> (REQUIRED)       Name of the target database
  -m, --migrations-path <migrations-path>  path to migration scripts folder [default: ./Migrations]
  -o, --output <output>                    path to output sql file [default: migration.sql]
  -?, -h, --help                           Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:

Usage:

Options:

  -m, --migrations-path <migrations-path>  path to migration scripts folder [default: ./Migrations]
  -o, --output <output>                    path to output sql file [default: migration.sql]
  -?, -h, --help                           Show help and usage information
